timeline.title: AEMO/Powerlink connection enquiry approved
timeline.detail: Connection enquiry approved. Full connection application underway.

timeline.title: Development application withdrawn from Ipswich City Council
timeline.detail: DA declared invalid under new QLD planning rules requiring BESS >50 MW to go through SARA with community benefit agreements. Needs re-lodgement.

sources.title: PV Magazine — Giant 3.4 GWh battery project

stages.name: DUID 1
stages.notes: AEMO splits into 4 x 212 MW DUIDs for dispatch. Single project, single planning approval.
